embed.title: !fort
embed.description: Alerts for pokestop and gym location updates — new stops appearing, removed stops, renames, location moves, photo changes.

fields.name: Fort type
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}fort pokestop` — only pokestops
`{{prefix}}fort gym` — only gyms
`{{prefix}}fort everything` — both

fields.name: Change types
fields.value:
`new` — new stops/gyms being added
`removal` — stops being removed
`name` — name changes
`location` — location moves
`photo` — photo updates
`include_empty` — also alert on empty/no-change events (noisy)

fields.name: Message flags
fields.value:
`ping`
`clean` — auto-delete (fort changes don't have a natural expiry, so clean has little effect)
